title: Sanguine
description: Practical guidance on peptides, nootropics, and the pursuit of robust health.

value.title: Practical guidance, carefully considered.
value.description: Peptides and nootropics, mapped from the literature and refined in practice. A repository of working knowledge — not a substitute for medical care.

items.label: Peptides
items.description: A working catalog of peptides, with summaries and sources.

items.description: Cognitive compounds, ranked and explained — from established to experimental.

value.text: The information on this site is for educational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice. Consult a qualified clinician before making any change to your health practices.
